Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Return of the Obra Dinn: spherical mapped dithering for a 1bpp first-person game 371 upvotes, 48 comments
  2. Linux Page Faults, MMAP, and userfaultfd for faster VM boots 34 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. Noq: n0's new QUIC implementation in Rust 206 upvotes, 32 comments
  4. NanoGPT Slowrun: 10x Data Efficiency with Infinite Compute 149 upvotes, 32 comments
  5. ArXiv Declares Independence from Cornell 293 upvotes, 76 comments
  6. Full Disclosure: A Third (and Fourth) Azure Sign-In Log Bypass Found 147 upvotes, 34 comments
  7. Drawvg Filter for FFmpeg 50 upvotes, 9 comments
  8. OpenBSD: PF queues break the 4 Gbps barrier 203 upvotes, 60 comments
  9. Building a Reader for the Smallest Hard Drive 38 upvotes, 7 comments
  10. Show HN: Three new Kitten TTS models – smallest less than 25MB 432 upvotes, 160 comments
  11. Drugwars for the TI-82/83/83 Calculators (2011) 144 upvotes, 53 comments
  12. FSFE supporters affected: Payment provider Nexi cancelled us 55 upvotes, 18 comments
  13. Be intentional about how AI changes your codebase 123 upvotes, 49 comments
  14. Scaling Karpathy's Autoresearch: What Happens When the Agent Gets a GPU Cluster 180 upvotes, 79 comments
  15. Launch HN: Voltair (YC W26) – Drone and charging network for power utilities 72 upvotes, 27 comments
  16. Cursor Composer 2 is just Kimi K2.5 with RL 38 upvotes, 12 comments
  17. How the Turner twins are mythbusting modern technical apparel 237 upvotes, 117 comments
  18. Clockwise acquired by Salesforce 123 upvotes, 60 comments
  19. Astral to Join OpenAI 1368 upvotes, 844 comments
  20. Push events into a running session with channels 337 upvotes, 190 comments
  21. Cockpit is a web-based graphical interface for servers 262 upvotes, 149 comments
  22. FSF Threatens Anthropic over Infringed Copyright: Share Your LLMs Freel 115 upvotes, 61 comments
  23. Flash-KMeans: Fast and Memory-Efficient Exact K-Means 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  24. How many branches can your CPU predict? 84 upvotes, 49 comments
  25. A Journey Through Infertility 35 upvotes, 23 comments
  26. Google details new 24-hour process to sideload unverified Android apps 842 upvotes, 912 comments
  27. Waymo Safety Impact 319 upvotes, 333 comments
  28. Essex police pause facial recognition camera use after study finds racial bias 8 upvotes, 3 comments
  29. Too Much Color 11 upvotes, 9 comments
  30. 4Chan mocks £520k fine for UK online safety breaches 383 upvotes, 661 comments

Last generated 6:30pm, 20 March 2026. Source here.
